steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: ”Forest researchers regularly dispute one another's classifications”— scientists fundamentally disagree on how to classify forests.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: “Consensus” (agreement) fits the logic: without agreement on what these categories mean, scientists naturally produce different estimates, explaining the discrepancy. The other three don't establish this chain of logic. That matches choice D — D is correct.
